title: CVE-2005-4197 — CVSS 7.5 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-2005-4197

CVSS Score: 7.5 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 2005-12-13T11:03:00.000
CWEs: NVD-CWE-Other

tunnelform.yaws in Nortel SSL VPN 4.2.1.6 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary commands via a link in the a parameter, which is executed with extra privileges in a cryptographically signed Java Applet.

References: http://secunia.com/advisories/17974, http://securitytracker.com/id?1015341, http://www.sec-consult.com/247.html
